# README Verification

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/repoverification -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

Executable SSOT: [`verification.riido.json`](verification.riido.json).

Evidence artifact: `repo-verification-evidence`.

## Commands

### all-tests

Run the public daemon test suite.

```bash
go test ./...
```

### module-boundary

List modules for the Riido-owned dependency boundary.

```bash
go list -m all
```

### storecontract-tests

Run the Store distribution verifier tests.

```bash
go test ./tools/storecontract
```

### storecontract-repo

Verify package and store distribution contract against this repository.

```bash
go run ./tools/storecontract -contract packaging/store/riido_daemon_store_distribution.riido.json -repo .
```

### cli-build

Build the local helper CLI.

```bash
go build -o /tmp/riido ./cmd/riido
```

### cli-help

Verify CLI help renders.

```bash
go run ./cmd/riido --help
```

### bridge-providers

Verify provider registry output renders.

```bash
go run ./cmd/riido bridge providers
```

## Assertions

- verification reader doc is generated from this manifest
- commands are represented as argv arrays, not prose
- public CI can run the command set and upload compact evidence
